author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Fable - Gameplay Demo | Build an Extraordinary Life
Step into Albion and find out what it means to build an extraordinary life.
 
This extended gameplay demo dives into the heart of Fable's living population - a systemic, interconnected game-within-a-game. Charm your way into friendships, raise a family, or chase wealth, power and prestige as you venture across Albion. Or why not all of the above?

Fable launches on February 23, 2027. Become the Hero you want to be in an immersive open-world action-RPG where each choice shapes your journey, reputation is everything, and fairytale endings are never guaranteed.

✨ Pre-Order now to receive the Pre-Order Content Pack, featuring the questionably heroic Chicken Suit and a collection of charming in-game gifts:

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/fable/9pmn4dgrt1ln

SUBSCRIBE TO XBOX: https://xbx.lv/2EEjmaR

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
State of Decay 3 Games Showcase Deep Dive | Official XBOX Podcast
On this episode of the Official XBOX Podcast, we're at Undead Labs and diving deep into a horde of information about State of Decay 3. We're talking about the Games Showcase trailer, what you may have missed, and giving you a ton of behind the scenes information about the open-world zombie survival game.

00:00 Introduction
01:05 How would you explain State of Decay 3 to a person playing for the first time?
03:34 What does community mean to the team and in the game""
05:25 What was the process like creating this trailer for Showcase?
08:56 What's the story behind the song choice?
13:26 What gameplay mechanics did you want to focus on in the trailer?
14:35 Multiplayer and Alpha testing
18:18 SUV and new vehicles
21:06 New outfits
23:18 Locations, settlements, and weather
25:59 Caroliine
27:08 Weather systems
27:59 Zombies, Ferals, Bloaters, and Plague Nests, oh my!
34:15 What are you most excited for players to experience in SD3?
39:23 Outro

Listen to us on Spotify/Apple Podcasts 🎧 
https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/officialxboxpodcast

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
FINAL FANTASY RESONANCE - Announce Trailer
FINAL FANTASY RESONANCE is the first FINAL FANTASY in HD‑2D! Coming to XBOX Series X|S and Xbox on PC October 22, 2026.

Return to the pixel‑art world of FINAL FANTASY, evolved from its classic roots. Travel with companions bound by fate and call on Visions, echoes of beloved FINAL FANTASY characters, to aid you in battle to uncover the truth behind a force that threatens to bring everything to ruin.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen - Announcement Trailer
Arisen, your time has come once again. 🔥

Dragon's Dogma 2 returns as Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen! Your unwritten epic begins on XBOX Series X|S on October 9, 2026. 

The dynamic fantasy world is expanded with new tales and thrilling encounters. Embark to a snowy new area in the north: the long-abandoned Norgan region, and take on 12 new dungeon challenges spread across the existing world of Dragon's Dogma 2. Also bring your Arisen and Pawns to life with new hairstyles and tattoo options.

Free Title Updates are on the way! The first arrives June 9 with quality-of-life improvements, including the addition of an Eternal Ferrystone and more Portcrystals. A second update in August brings framerate and performance improvements to all platforms, additional save slots, and many more adjustments and improvements. 

Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen contains both the Dragon's Dogma 2 base game and the Dark Arisen Expansion content in one package. The Dark Arisen Expansion will be available as a separate DLC on XBOX Series X|S and PC.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/dragons-dogma-2/9pjqmbmj3154

SUBSCRIBE TO XBOX: https://xbx.lv/2EEjmaR

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
FreeStyle Football 2 | World Fiesta Trailer
FreeStyle Football 2 is the latest installment from Joycity, offering dynamic 5v5 sports action where each player controls a unique, colorful character to experience the true thrill of football. Kicking off in 2026 on XBOX Series X|S, Day One with Game Pass.

Join the World Fiesta in FreeStyle Football 2 now on XBOX!
https://www.xbox.com/games/store/freestyle-football-2-obt-demo/9mtpskhmtxtj

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Bellwright - Launch Trailer
Bellwright is out now on XBOX  Series X|S!

A medieval open-world, survival adventure.

Establish and expand your own settlements, liberate the land and assist its villagers, and recruit others to your cause while learning more about a life you had to leave behind.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/bellwright/9nwzps8x9jqg

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
NBA THE RUN | Official Launch Trailer
It's time to RUN!

Take your favorite NBA superstars to iconic streetball courts around the world in online, 3v3 knockout tournaments filled with posterizing moments, ankle-breaking tricks and all out physicality on D. With a unique and stylized look and feel, there's know other basketball game that looks or plays like NBA THE RUN. 

NBA THE RUN is out now on XBOX Series X|S and PC.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/nba-the-run/9p9868m45nqz

#nbatherun

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
JUJUTSU KAISEN RUMBLE: SURVIVATON Announcement Trailer
Survive, Exorcise, Change the game

JUJUTSU KAISEN RUMBLE: SURVIVATON is a survivors royale where you battle cursed spirits and rival sorcerers, growing stronger throughout the match. Outscore your rivals and fight to be the last player standing victorious.

©Gege Akutami/Shueisha, JUJUTSU KAISEN Project
©SHUEISHA, SHUEISHA GAMES developed by Poncle Limited
